channel.title: Syncognito App Changelog
channel.description: Most recent changes with links to updates.

item.title: Version 1.0.0
item.description:
Initial Release

  • Real-time folder monitoring with FSEvents
  • Automatic sync to external drives, NAS, or any folder
  • Multiple sync jobs support
  • Configurable sync intervals
  • Menubar integration with animated sync indicator
  • Progress tracking for sync operations
  • Security-scoped bookmarks for persistent access
